## Checklist
- [ ] Branched from `dev` (not `main`)
- [ ] Branch name follows convention: `feature/<domain>/<desc>`, `fix/<domain>/<desc>`, `chore/<desc>`, or `docs/<desc>`
- [ ] Conventional Commits format: `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `test:`
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes locally
- [ ] CODEOWNERS auto-assigned reviewers (if touching a domain)
- [ ] No secrets in code or `.env` files
- [ ] No commented-out code
